# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function test: int (x: int)
  entry:
      t5 = 0
      t6 = 0
      t8 = 0
      t10 = ADD x_1, x_1
      t11 = ADD t10, x_1
      t12 = ADD t11, x_1
      t13 = ADD t12, t5
      t14 = ADD t13, t6
      t15 = ADD t14, x_1
      t16 = ADD t15, t8
      t17 = ADD t16, x_1
      RETURN t17

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t18 = CALL test, 10
      RETURN t18
